target: word_class: noun / verb / adjective, derived from WC column
notes: No imputation, scaling or train/test split has been applied in these prepared CSV files.
This avoids data leakage; imputation and standardization should be fitted on the training set only.
The expanded terms file contains original features, squared terms and all pairwise interactions: 65 + 65 + C(65,2) = 2210.
